name: Munchin Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Each of pickle relish and Unseasoned dry bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients, except oil and dipping sauce ingredients.
2. Roll mixture into 24 1-inch meatballs.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Saute meatballs until browned and no longer pink in the center, about 10-15 minutes.
5. Serve warm with dipping sauce.
Dipping Sauce
1/3 c. thawed orange juice concentrate
1/4 c. honey
2 Tbsp Apple cider vinegar
1 tbsp Dijon mustard
1/2 tsp Dried tarragon
1 tbsp Cornstarch
3/4 c. Chicken broth
Combine the orange juice concentrate, honey, vinegar, mustard, and dried tarragon in a small saucepan. Mix cornstarch with chicken broth and stir into the boiling mixture. Continue to boil until thickened for 1 minute.
